title: Those Who Led the People in Prayer in the Mosque of the Messenger of God while 'Uthman Was under Siege
description: of the Messenger of God while 'Uthman Was under Siege According to Muhammad b. 'Umar (al-Wagidi)-Rabi'ah b. 'Uthman: The muezzin Sa'd al-QaraZ came to'Ali b. Abi Talib on that day and asked, "Who will lead the people in prayer?" `Ali responded, "Summon Khalid b. Zayd." (Sa'd) did so, and Khalid b. Zayd led the people in prayer. That was the first day it was known that the name of Abu Ayyub al-Angari was Khalid b. Zayd.462 He led them in prayer for some days, then 'Ali took over this office thereafter. 461.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 15
